title: adenostyles alliariae subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Adenostyles alliariae subsp. pyrenaica, also known as the Pyrenean hedge bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Pyrenees mountain range. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Adenostyles alliariae subsp. pyrenaica include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
